coin_profile.name: XRP
coin_profile.description: XRP is the native token of the XRP Ledger (XRPL), designed for fast, low-cost cross-border payments and currency exchange. Ripple (the company) uses XRP in its On-Demand Liquidity product. XRP settles transactions in 3-5 seconds with fees under $0.01.

XRP.name: XRP

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Price above speculative fair value — no margin of safety.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

meta.data_note: No protocol fee or TVL data found for this token on DeFiLlama. Charts 1 and 2 are unavailable. Charts 3 and 4 show current-year supply and dilution data from CoinGecko.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 6.0/10 and survivability 66.7%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. M1 DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. M2 P/S compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. M3 P/E uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. M+ NVT treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. M+ Dilution-adj penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

XRP.iv_method: M+ Network Activity, M+ Rank Benchmark, M+ Dilution-adj

bear_points: No historical fee data available on DeFiLlama — protocol may be too new or too small to have an established economic track record

coin_profile.name: Monero
coin_profile.description: Monero is the leading privacy-focused cryptocurrency. It uses ring signatures, stealth addresses, and RingCT to make all transactions untraceable by default. XMR is proof-of-work mined and is widely used where financial privacy is paramount.

XMR.name: Monero

Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
